name: abelian
description: Adversarial collaboration framework (Kahneman-style applied to LLM dispatch) for deep, innovative, long-horizon iteration with tractable doc and testable metric. Two LLM peers each propose AND challenge each other; mutual inspiration between rounds; mechanism-converge termination. 15 INVARIANTS rules harden against fabrication, drift, compaction, mission drift, and cross-layer evidence confusion. v2.15: telos shift to goal-driven co-research — Mission Thread per round (rule #14, >=2 candidate_routes + selection_reason), Evidence Class enum (rule #15, 6-class ladder), commit-gate goal-progress check, Frame-break Protocol (5-step creative-escape replacing plateau-as-termination).
